Tax_Type: Domestic taxes on goods and services
Description: VAT (largest component at ~27% of total revenue), Fuel levy, Customs and excise duties, Environmental levies (carbon tax, plastic bag levy), and sin taxes (alcohol, tobacco).
Administrative fees, fines, penalties, interest on overdue taxes, and other non-tax revenue collected by SARS on behalf of the state.
Personal income tax (PAYE + provisional tax), Corporate income tax (CIT), Withholding taxes on dividends and royalties. Largest component of SARS revenue — typically ~60% of total.

Tax_Type: Taxes on international trade and transactions
Description: Import duties, Export duties, and other customs-related levies on cross-border trade. Administered through the SARS Customs division.
Skills Development Levy (SDL) paid by employers on wages, and Unemployment Insurance Fund (UIF) contributions. SDL rate is 1% of payroll.
Securities Transfer Tax (STT) on share transactions, Transfer Duty on property sales, and Estate Duty. Excludes municipal property rates (not collected by SARS).
Sum of all tax categories above. Represents SARS gross tax revenue for the fiscal year before any refunds or transfers to SACU member states.
